reviews.comment:
Atención rápida, después depende de la cantidad de autos que hay el día que vas , en temporada se hace fila, Pero los empleados trabajan bien , son amables. Fui varias veces en temporada, y la atención general es buena.

(Translated by Google)
Quick service, but it depends on the number of cars there that day. During peak season, there's usually a line. However, the employees are friendly and helpful. I've been several times during peak season, and the overall service is good.
